---
title: "Room_analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# loading libraries
install.packages("rjson")
install.packages("jsonlite")
library(tidyverse)
library(rjson)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# not using CRS
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
drop_crs <- function(x) {
  st_crs(x) <- NA
  x
}

# loading trajectory data and drop CRS
geo_trajectories <- st_read("data/all_trajectories_with_floor.geojson")
geo_trajectories$floorNumber <- as.integer(geo_trajectories$floorNumber)
geo_trajectories <- drop_crs(geo_trajectories)

#room plan and drop CRS
floor_0_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_0_all_objects.geojson")
floor_1_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_1_all_objects.geojson")
floor_2_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_2_all_objects.geojson")
floor_0_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_0_plan_sf)
floor_1_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_1_plan_sf)
floor_2_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_2_plan_sf)

#room plan - polygons and drop CRS
floor_0_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_0.geojson")
floor_1_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_1.geojson")
floor_2_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_2.geojson")
floor_0_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_0_rooms)
floor_1_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_1_rooms)
floor_2_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_2_rooms)

#renaming columns
floor_0_rooms <- floor_0_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)
floor_1_rooms <- floor_1_rooms %>% mutate(room_id = floor_plan)
floor_1_rooms <- floor_1_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)
floor_2_rooms <- floor_2_rooms %>% mutate(room_id = fid)
floor_2_rooms <- floor_2_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)

#trajectories based on floor
trajectory_f00 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 0)
trajectory_f01 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 1)
trajectory_f02 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 2)
```


```{r}
#combine trajectories with rooms for each floor
trajectory_f00_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f00,
  floor_0_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

trajectory_f01_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f01,
  floor_1_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

trajectory_f02_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f02,
  floor_2_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

#merge the floors together
trajectories_with_rooms <- bind_rows(
  trajectory_f00_rooms,
  trajectory_f01_rooms,
  trajectory_f02_rooms
)
```

```{r}
# check how many points did not get assigned a room
trajectories_with_rooms %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    total_points = n(),
    missing_room = sum(is.na(room_id)),
    missing_room_pct = mean(is.na(room_id)) * 100
  )
```




### OLD
```{r}
# combine coordinates of walls
walls <- map_dfr(plan$floors, function(floors) {
  map_dfr(floors$walls, function(wall) {
    p1 <- wall$position[[1]]
    p2 <- wall$position[[2]]
    
    painting_ids <- if (length(wall$paintings) == 0) {
      character(0)
    } else {
      map_chr(wall$paintings, "id")
    }
    
    tibble(
      floor = floors$number,
      wall_id = wall$id,
      x1 = p1$x,
      y1 = p1$y,
      x2 = p2$x,
      y2 = p2$y,
      painting_ids = list(painting_ids),
      type = "wall"
    )
  })
}) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    geometry = st_sfc(
      st_linestring(matrix(c(x1, y1, x2, y2), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = NA)

# combine coordinates of background objects
background <- map_dfr(plan$floors, function(floors) {
  map_dfr(floors$background, function(background) {
    p1 <- background$formToDraw[[1]]
    p2 <- background$formToDraw[[2]]
    
    tibble(
      floor = floors$number,
      background_id = background$id,
      type = background$type,
      x1 = p1$x,
      y1 = p1$y,
      x2 = p2$x,
      y2 = p2$y
    )
  })
}) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    geometry = st_sfc(
      st_linestring(matrix(c(x1, y1, x2, y2), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = NA)

# combine coordinates of walls and background into one dataframe adding background objects as new rows
combined_df <- bind_rows(
  list(walls, background)
)
```

```{r}
# plot
floor_id <- 0

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = combined_df %>% filter(floor == floor_id),
          linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_text(
    data = combined_df %>%
      filter(floor == floor_id) %>%
      mutate(
        mx = (x1 + x2) / 2,
        my = (y1 + y2) / 2
      ),
    aes(x = mx, y = my, label = wall_id),
    size = 1.8
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
max_x <- max(c(walls$x1, walls$x2), na.rm = TRUE)
max_y <- max(c(walls$y1, walls$y2), na.rm = TRUE)

walls_df_flipped <- walls %>%
  mutate(
    x1 = max_x - x1,
    x2 = max_x - x2,
    y1 = max_y - y1,
    y2 = max_y - y2
  )

walls_sf_flipped <- walls_df_flipped %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    geometry = st_sfc(
      st_linestring(matrix(c(x1, y1, x2, y2), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = NA)

traj_flipped <- traj %>%
  mutate(
    x = max_x - x,
    y = max_y - y
  )

floor_id <- 0

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = walls_sf_flipped %>% filter(floor == floor_id), linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(
    data = traj_flipped %>%
      filter(floor == floor_id),
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    size = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
round_linestring <- function(geom, digits = 0) {
  coords <- st_coordinates(geom)[, c("X", "Y")]
  coords <- round(coords, digits)
  st_linestring(coords)
}

make_polygons <- function(floor_id, area_threshold = 5000) {
  wall_floor <- walls %>%
    filter(floor == floor_id) %>%
    mutate(
      geometry = st_sfc(map(geometry, round_linestring, digits = 0), crs = NA)
    )
  
  linework <- wall_floor %>%
    st_geometry() %>%
    st_union() %>%
    st_node()
  
  st_polygonize(linework) %>%
    st_collection_extract("POLYGON") %>%
    st_sf(
      floor = floor_id,
      poly_id = paste0("f", floor_id, "_p", seq_along(.)),
      geometry = .
    ) %>%
    mutate(area_px = as.numeric(st_area(geometry))) %>%
    filter(area_px > area_threshold)
}

polys_0 <- make_polygons(0)
```
